title: Open Positions: Staff - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Open Positions: Staff - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Open Positions: Khoury College Staff
Khoury College believes that computer science is for everyone. We seek people who will work together to foster a diverse, inclusive environment to achieve this mission. We’re growing rapidly, with positions frequently available across our different campuses — from Boston to Silicon Valley.
For full details on qualifications and application instructions, see the locations and job postings below. You’ll be directed to Northeastern’s Workday job listings for full information.
Boston
Our flagship campus in Boston is just minutes away from other top universities, exciting start-ups, and leaders in tech, finance, health care, and more.
Director Pre-Award Administration
Faculty Affairs Coordinator
Principal Research Software Engineer
Senior Systems Software Developer
Arlington
Our campus in Arlington gives you access to both business and government, with tech positioned at the front.
There are no positions available at this time.
London
There are no positions available at this time.
Miami
At our Miami campus, you’ll be a part of Miami’s rapid transformation as a leader in the knowledge economy.
There are no positions available at this time.
Oakland
Our 135-acre Oakland campus, home to Mills College at Northeastern, is a green oasis with deep roots in a vibrant, urban community.
There are no positions available at this time.
Portland, Maine
Our Portland campus takes advantage of Maine’s growing tech economy, affordable real estate, and ready access to transportation.
There are no positions available at this time.
Seattle
Our Seattle campus is situated in South Lake Union, a center for innovation and discovery near tech industry giants like Amazon and Microsoft.
Graduate Student Services Coordinator
Silicon Valley
Our Silicon Valley campus is at the center of this globally recognized hub of innovation, entrepreneurship, and growth adjacent to high-tech pioneers like Facebook and Google.
There are no positions available at this time.
Vancouver
Our Vancouver campus joins our location in Seattle in bringing superb talent to the international tech superhub known as the Cascadia Innovation Corridor.
There are no positions available at this time.
